transcript.clean_text: time to celebrate the winners of lavuelte richie carapaz came home on stage 20 for another stage win on a polka dot jersey but our overall winner as the tears flowed ever first belgian in 44 years to have taken a grand tour win maybe this is the opening of floodgates we shall see spectacular performance by the youngster two minutes and five his margin at the beginning of the day over enric mass well all the bikes badged up they're all in the right colors as well green of course for mass pedersen would it be another stage win for him ecuadorian and south american fans were filling the air with their cheers and indeed there was an acknowledgement as well of a passing of the battle so there congratulations alejandro valverde and of course vichenzo nibili this their final grand tour and a guard of honour from the pelican at the beginning of the day well we all knew what lay ahead a reasonably benign start before the sprinters would have their fun on a three-legged star at the end of the day in madrid quite a technical course with an intermediate sprint along the way just in case anyone was out there hunting for bonus seconds well it's like ironsman and of course carlos rodriguez perhaps well we had all of the usual celebrations from having nepal with his quick step team full of smiles but then the serious faces started to arrive not before alejandro valverde had taken a lap of honour through madrid saying thank you to the fans who thanked him right back and then the serious business of finishing off this race began well it got busy and first of all with the second passage of the start finish line for the intermediate sprint and mcmaster in fact getting up to take points here and bonus seconds antsman and rodriguez were the ones hunting though rodriguez from india's grenadiers just hoping to find a couple of seconds over ironsman but it was not to be what was to be was a very feisty challenge by a couple of breakaway riders and very talented they were too julie johansson from intermarche 1t went off the front with luke plapp as well from india's grenadiers and in fact they dangled out there like a carrot teasing the pelican as the laps were counted down we finally got to the bell and they were still out front a modest margin perhaps with technical corners to deal with they weren't to be caught until the sight of the flam rouge platte was loving it just smiling to the crowd no smiles of course on the faces of the sprinters as they lit it up in that final turn who would be first to go that was the big question well it was a fine drive from distance from uae team emirates evo oliveira did the setup it was supposed to be finished off by milano handing to ackermann but milano just had to keep driving why because mass pedestrian was on his case but in the end it was almost an accidental win for juan sebastian milano had to keep going mass pedestal finishing second pascal ackermann third well it may not have been the way the script was supposed to play out but milano just enthralling the colombian fans many of whom of course had turned up here to see their heroes punch of the air for mark solaire the man who took the overall combativity award milano winning the day ahead of pedersen and ackermann turner and van popple rounding out the top five and of course finally the coronation of our champion remcore ever nepal amongst his teammates the celebrations loud and proud evan nepal wins the race by two minutes and two over henrik master picked up bonus seconds in today's sprint the intermediate a year finishing four minutes in 57 down two spaniards on the podium voting well for the future of spanish cycling there can only be one winner and that winner is of course remco evan paul in the points jersey that's patterson winning by an enormous margin and of course the king of the mountain and one of the most popular winners of any of the jerseys richie kara has three stage wins to his name and the future well it's for the youngsters isn't it and the youngest overall combativity going to mark solaire and his team ue team emirates taking the overall team prize a magnificent race drawing to a close in madrid you
